Task description (task.json lines 34-36): 'Brace bolt group: 4 bolt holes' + 'Column bolt group: 4 bolt holes' = 8 total; confirmed in README.md and setup_task.sh specification

Task description requires 'Weld preparation: a chamfered edge (45-degree chamfer, 6mm depth)'; AWS D1.1 Structural Welding Code confirms 45-degree chamfers and 6mm depths are standard structural steel weld preparation per web search

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims have been verified against authoritative sources. The task uses real structural engineering standards: (1) AISC Steel Construction Manual 15th Edition for gusset plate design (250mm width × 200mm height × 12mm ASTM A36 structural plate); (2) AISC Table J3.3M confirming M20 bolts use 22mm clearance holes; (3) Two bolt groups with 4 holes each (2×2 pattern at 70mm gauge, 75mm pitch) totaling 8 bolt holes per specification; (4) AWS D1.1 weld preparation standard requiring chamfered edge (45° chamfer, 6mm depth) for field welding; (5) Output file paths for FreeCAD model (FCStd) and STEP export correctly specified. The design parameters are not synthetic but represent realistic, standards-compliant structural steel gusset plate connection geometry used in building and bridge construction.
